title: Fruiterra S2 - PCOF
description: A collection of my favourite forge mods of Minecraft version 1.20.1, bundled into a pack for my friends and I to enjoy.
body:
## 📝 Peach's Note

**Peach's Collection of Forge is a collection of all of my favourite mods from Forge and a few additions from my friends. This particular release is my favourites of Minecraft version 1.20.1.**

The pack covers many areas of mods, including:
- World Generation
- Storage Options
- Technology
- Magic
- Exploration and Adventure
- Building
- Foods and Crops
- Quality of Life
- Utility
- Performance
- Bug Fixes and Stability

*Designed with love for fwendos :3*

## 🐱‍🚀 Peach's Challenges

- Refine your favourite biome from Terralith and Biomes O' Plenty to make it into the dream landscape.
- Build a giant village, either with vanilla Villagers, or with Minecolonies, and keep them safe from the looming evils. 
- Become a master in your favourite storage mod, building the biggest storage network ever. I hope you can still find your most valuable items when you're done...
- Did someone say... Nuclear...?
- Collect all the inventory pets!
- Rule over the server with your favourite magic mod! MORE SACRIFIES.
- Conquer the new dungeons, dimensions, and bosses.
- Farm. Food. Fantabulous. Which one? All of them. 
- Completely destroy your server with the largest and most amazing Create projects! (for legal purposes, this is a joke)
- Link up all your base locations and your friends via a railroad network! Did somebody say we're going for a train ride?

## 📋 Mods List

For the full mods list, please visit [this page](https://cameronvarga.notion.site/Peach-s-Collection-of-Forge-1-20-1-4fa367865c6941d9a581c6b3513da03c).

## 😨 Issues?

If you come across any major issues, please join [the discord server](https://discord.com/invite/FjfsnMy) and let me know!
